# .github

## Purpose

GitHub configuration: CI/CD workflows and Renovate dependency updates.

## Key Files

| File | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `renovate.json` | Renovate bot configuration for automated dependency updates |

## Subdirectories

| Directory | Purpose |
|-----------|---------|
| `workflows/` | GitHub Actions CI pipelines (see `workflows/AGENTS.md`) |
